# Oral Plastic Surgery — La Jolla, CA

> Board-certified periodontists specializing in esthetic periodontal surgery, dental implants, bone and tissue grafting, microsurgery, and LANAP laser therapy. Serving La Jolla, San Diego, and surrounding communities.

Practice address: 850 Prospect St, Suite 7, La Jolla, CA 92037. Phone: (858) 459-7374. Specialty: Periodontics. Founded by Dr. Stephen B. Hutton (DMD, MS Oral Biology, MPH, Board-certified Periodontist, retired US Navy Commander). All clinical content is authored or reviewed by board-certified periodontists for patient education accuracy.

## About

- [Practice Overview](https://oralplasticsurgery.com/about/): Our team, philosophy, and approach to periodontal care
- [Dr. Stephen B. Hutton](https://oralplasticsurgery.com/about/dr-stephen-hutton/): DMD, MS Oral Biology, MPH; board-certified periodontist; retired US Navy Commander; pioneer of 3D-printed surgical stents and AI-assisted diagnostics in periodontal treatment
- [Dr. Peter Nordland](https://oralplasticsurgery.com/about/dr-peter-nordland/): Board-certified periodontist; AAP Fellow
- [Dr. John Lofthus](https://oralplasticsurgery.com/about/dr-john-lofthus/): Board-certified periodontist

## Services

- [All Services](https://oralplasticsurgery.com/services/): Full periodontal services menu
- [Periodontal Health](https://oralplasticsurgery.com/services/periodontal-health/): Diagnosis and treatment of gum disease using minimally invasive techniques
- [Bone & Tissue Grafting](https://oralplasticsurgery.com/services/bone-tissue-grafting/): Regenerative procedures rebuilding bone volume and gum tissue for implants and oral health
- [Dental Implants & Restoration](https://oralplasticsurgery.com/services/dental-implants/): Precision-guided implants, full-arch restoration (All-on-X), 3D imaging
- [Advanced Treatment](https://oralplasticsurgery.com/services/advanced-treatment/): Complex full-mouth rehabilitation, All-on-4/X, zygomatic implants
- [Jawbone Health](https://oralplasticsurgery.com/services/jawbone-health/): Diagnosis and treatment of jawbone conditions
- [Prophylaxis (Teeth Cleaning)](https://oralplasticsurgery.com/services/prophylaxis/): Professional dental prophylaxis and tartar removal
- [Scaling & Root Planing](https://oralplasticsurgery.com/services/scaling-root-planing/): Non-surgical deep cleaning beneath the gum line
- [Bone Grafting](https://oralplasticsurgery.com/services/bone-grafting/): Major and minor bone grafting to rebuild jawbone volume
- [LANAP Laser Therapy](https://oralplasticsurgery.com/services/laser-therapy/): Laser periodontal therapy — no scalpel, no sutures
- [Bite Adjustment](https://oralplasticsurgery.com/services/bite-adjustment/): Correction of destructive bite patterns and TMJ stress
- [Gum Grafting](https://oralplasticsurgery.com/services/gum-grafting/): Reconstruction of receded gum tissue and root coverage
- [Guided Bone & Tissue Regeneration](https://oralplasticsurgery.com/services/guided-bone-regeneration/): Membranes and biologics to regenerate bone and connective tissue
- [Cosmetic Periodontal Surgery](https://oralplasticsurgery.com/services/cosmetic-periodontal-surgery/): Crown lengthening, gum line reshaping, ridge preservation
- [Oral Cancer Exam](https://oralplasticsurgery.com/services/oral-cancer-exam/): Annual screening with laser-assisted visualization

## Patient Resources

- [Patient Resources](https://oralplasticsurgery.com/patient-resources/): FAQs, new patient information, financing, pre/post-op instructions
- [Success Stories](https://oralplasticsurgery.com/success-stories/): 42 documented clinical outcomes with before/after images

## Contact

- [Contact](https://oralplasticsurgery.com/contact/): Office location, hours, contact form
- [Request Consultation](https://oralplasticsurgery.com/appointment/): Book an appointment
- [Submit a Referral](https://oralplasticsurgery.com/referral/): Referring-doctor portal

## Specialties

Periodontics, periodontal surgery, dental implants, bone regeneration, microsurgery, LANAP laser therapy, gum grafting, sinus lifts, full-arch implant rehabilitation (All-on-4/X), peri-implant disease management, oral cancer screening.

## Service Area

La Jolla, San Diego, San Diego County, CA.
